name: Kohaku
description: Sango's younger brother who was once under the control of Naraku. When Naraku disguised himself as Kagewaki Hitomi, the son of a lord, he used Lord Hitomi's father to call upon Sango and the demon slayers to slay a false demon. Kohaku was made to turn against his companions, killing his father and all the demon slayers, Sango surviving only by sheer luck. Kohaku was killed that night also by the castle guards, only to be later resurrected by Naraku as an amnesiac puppet. After several encounters

name: Konomi Tatara
description: __Species:__ Human __Height:__ 155 cm __Peach Ability:__ Golden Xing Yi Quan, "Beast Power" __Affiliation:__ Anti-Demon Corps (1st Unit Chief) Konomi Tatara is the Anti-Demon Corps' 1st Unit new Chief after the previous Chief, Riu Myouga stepped down from her position.

name: Koto
description: Koto is the referee in the Dark Tournament. She is a fox demon like Kurama, but seems to have no special abilities. She is later replaced by Juri and switches to commentary. She was also the referee in the Makai Tournament. She is an idol in both the human and demon planes. She seems to have a crush on Kurama's demon form, Yoko. name: Kuina
description: __Height:__ 150 cm (4'11") __Occupations:__ Trainee Swordsman __Origin:__ East Blue (Shimotsuki Village) Kuina was the childhood friend of Roronoa Zoro. Throughout her life, Kuina pushed herself harder then usual in kendo in order to be accepted in the male-dominated discipline. Even her father thought that she could never be the best because she was a girl. While training in the same dojo, Kuina was the only person Zoro was never able to beat in a sword fight. name: Leo
description: A young painter with an unhappy childhood and a past as a beggar, he accepts after many hesitations to take Arte as his apprentice, above all because in her he sees himself when he had decided to pursue his vocation at the expense of his humble origins. Reluctant and of few words, but with remarkable talent, he has managed over the years to enter into the good graces of some of the most well-known exponents of the Florentine nobility. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Liselotte Cretia
nativeName: リーゼロッテ・クレティア
description: The governor of Amande and founder of the Rikka firm, which quickly established itself as an international enterprise with branches in other countries. ~!Like with Rio and Latifa, she has memories of a previous life as Minamoto Rikka, a high schooler!~

name: Lusamine
description: Lusamine is a character introduced in Pokémon Sun and Moon. She is the head of the Aether Foundation.

name: Makoto Yuuki
description: __Unit:__ Trickstar __Club:__ Tennis Club __Circles:__ CRAFTMONSTER, Mystery Researchers Experienced as a child model, his posing technique is unmatched. As a person, he's cheerful and easy to get along with. His glasses are his charm point. With a bright, charming singing voice, Makoto's performances are heartfelt and flexible. (Source: Ensemble Stars!! Wiki)

name: Masamune Izumi
description: __Height:__ 176cm Izumi Masamune is the protagonist of the story. He is a novelist that goes by the pen name "Izumi Masamune," his same name. He started out his novels in middle school after winning a light novel writing contest. He hopes to get closer to his younger step-sister.

name: Motong Chen
description: __Level:__ A Chen Motong is an A-Rank student and one of the main representatives of the Student Union. ~! She is also Caesar Gattuso's fiancée and Lu Mingfei's love interest through the story. !~

name: Mun-Yeong Lee
description: Lee Mun-Yeong is an S-class Wild's High School second year student, where she is the president of the boxing club and Queen's best friend and confidante. She is loud, rambunctious, and outgoing, as opposed to the reserved personality that Queen shows. However, when she is fighting seriously, she becomes a very powerful and frightening opponent, well-deserving of being Queen's best friend. She has a friendly rivalry with Choi Dal-Dal over martial arts and the attention of the series' protagonist,

name: Narita Brian
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") A member of team Rigil. A lone wolf of few words and ample strength, Narita Brian is feared throughout the academy due to both her personality and her performance on the turf. She has little interest in anything besides running, which she does only to quench her own endless thirst. Off the racecourse, she is [Biwa Hayahide's](https://anilist.co/character/174851/Biwa-Hayahide) little sister and, for some reason, a student council vice president.

name: Obikawa Kiyoshi
description: Obikawa is a resident in Tsurukame Villa along with Tokinaga and the landlord Ikari-san. ~!He is, in actuality, the snake Ipo known as Orokapi, who had eaten the original Obikawa Kiyoshi and took over his body.!~
